GenAiFunction.description: Probe each agent dependency and return a status report. Use when the user asks "check your health", "are you OK?", "run a self-check", or similar. Checks Salesforce REST API, Tooling API, TavilyApi (web search), Data Cloud, Memory storage, and Custom Settings. Every probe runs independently — one failure does not stop the others. Returns a formatted report with [OK] or [ERROR] for each dependency.
